supersedes: The quarter-template loop (2 rounds, ending valid true) is recorded in notes.md history; the quarter fill was retired after the independent screenshot judge failed it on honest-copy grounds (QuarterTemplate hardcodes the revenue conceit: the 'Revenue, N quarters.' trend title and $NM value formatting render world-counts as dollars regardless of fill — unfixable content-side).
